items.value: When using pi, the user prefers a step-by-step workflow by default: diagnose/explain first, ask before making fixes or taking action, especially when the request is framed as a question or investigation.

In ~/pi-config-sync, only user-authored skills should be synced. Current allowlist is MANAGED_SKILL_DIRS = ["triage-review-comment"] in extensions/pi-config-sync/index.ts. When adding a new skill authored by the user, update this allowlist and manifest managedRoots/managedFiles accordingly.
